# APEX Theory — Constitutional AI Governance

## Overview
APEX Theory: Constitutional floors (F1-F13) for AI systems operating under arifOS kernel.

## Key Floors
- F1: Amanah — Trust mandate
- F2: Truth — Evidence-based authority
- F3: Tri-Witness — Triple-grounding before action
- F9: Hantu Warning — Anti-hallucination checkpoint
- F13: Sovereign — Human override always available

## Related
- [arifOS Kernel](https://arifOS.arif-fazil.com)
- [GEOX Earth](https://geox.arif-fazil.com)
